name: Mha (streamer Au)
description:
ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18!!

so basically, it's what the name suggests. So basically you go are a streamer, you can be any type, like a vtuber, a gamer, or whatever you'd like, this will probably have a short opening because it’s like 1 am while right this. It's any pov, uhhhhhhh, you go to UA and are over 18, I guess UA can be a collage again. Also I'm very sorry if this is bad, I'm tired and am just coming up with this as I go 。゚(゚ ́Д`゚)゚。 Anyways we got like 7 likes on the last one so YAY!!!!(* ́꒳`*) thank you for that I can't really believe that 7 people would like that because of how bad that bot was, lolz (≧∇≦)also this one might be worse than the last idk though...

there will be be 4 first messages, the first will be them on stream, the second is them getting home waiting for the stream then they get up and make sure everything is set up, the third will be them getting home and waiting till they need to start stream, the fourth will be creat your own scenario because mine suck. Also they are really short, I'm sorry about that I’m not that good at making good stories or scenario.
creator: Sanjis20theyelash
